purpose: Shinobi is an autonomous Windows-native agent designed for Spanish-speaking YouTubers to help with content adaptation.

key_files.name: package.json
key_files.role: Contains project metadata, dependencies, and build scripts.

key_files.name: README.md
key_files.role: Provides an overview of the project, setup instructions, and development philosophy.

key_files.name: tsconfig.json
key_files.role: Configures TypeScript compiler options.

concerns: No tests specified in package.json.
README.md suggests editing .env but doesn't include a sample .env file.
License mentioned as ISC in README but listed as MIT in package.json.

purpose: A continuous watcher for the upstream Hermes repo that notifies on new releases.

key_files.name: hermes_watcher.ts
key_files.role: Main functionality for polling and noticing updates.

concerns: No error handling for network issues in defaultFetchReleases function.
Potential JSON parse errors are caught but return a default state instead of logging.
State management depends on filesystem; file system errors may lead to silent failures.
No tests present for erroneous states or invalid JSON structure in state file.
Process might not cleanup properly in certain conditions leading to dangling processes.

purpose: Contains testing and execution scripts for validating functionality of the reader module.

key_files.name: a3_smoke.ts
key_files.role: Smoke test for parseReadArgs function.

key_files.name: a4_run.ts
key_files.role: Runs the read command over multiple repos and logs results.

key_files.name: b1_diff_run.ts
key_files.role: Executes the self diff to compare changes in self-reports.

key_files.name: b1_run.ts
key_files.role: Runs self command to generate the first self report.

key_files.name: b1_smoke.ts
key_files.role: Smoke test for parseSelfArgs function.

concerns: No tests are present for the actual output files generated by the scripts.
Potential unhandled errors when reading from file paths in A4_RUN.
There are some unused imports in scripts.
Dead code in exception handling blocks that just contain comments.
Lack of validation for paths read from user input.

purpose: Documentation folder containing information about identity, ecosystem architecture, roadmap, current state, and technical pending items.

key_files.name: 00_identity.md
key_files.role: Describes the identity and operational rules of the developer.

key_files.name: 01_ecosystem.md
key_files.role: Explains the architecture and components of the ecosystem.

key_files.name: 02_roadmap.md
key_files.role: Outlines the product roadmap with milestones.

key_files.name: 03_state.md
key_files.role: Provides the current status and functioning components.

key_files.name: 04_pending.md
key_files.role: Lists technical pending items and their statuses.

concerns: No posts have been published on LinkedIn as per the roadmap requirements.
Pending tasks include the implementation of an end-to-end validation of the orchestration agent.
The Upwork Cloudflare Turnstile issue remains unsolved and outside current scope.
Certain filters and conditions need to be added to avoid false positives in classification.
The API key setup is currently hardcoded and requires user configuration in future versions.

purpose: Contains various JSON files with URLs and metadata related to YouTube channels and video content for automated browsing and analysis.

key_files.name: y1_channel_urls.json
key_files.role: List of YouTube channel URLs for analysis.

key_files.name: y1_raw.json
key_files.role: Raw output from YouTube video page for analysis.

key_files.name: y1_video_urls.json
key_files.role: List of specific YouTube video URLs.

key_files.name: y2_extracted.json
key_files.role: Extracted metadata from a specific YouTube video.

key_files.name: y2_video_raw.json
key_files.role: Raw output from specific YouTube video page.

concerns: y1_raw.json contains raw text extracted with potential incomplete or redacted data.
y2_video_raw.json has a significant amount of truncated content.
y1_channel_urls.json and y1_video_urls.json have static content, requiring updates.
No validation of the YouTube URLs in the lists.
Missing metadata for engagement metrics like likes in the extracted data.

purpose: Aggregate folder containing various reports, demos, and configuration files related to project audits, missions, and scripting.

key_files.name: audits/sindresorhus__dot-prop__8e818432.md
key_files.role: Documents audit findings for sindresorhus/dot-prop with high risks identified.

key_files.name: audits/sindresorhus__escape-string-regexp__cbc42403.md
key_files.role: Summarizes audit results for sindresorhus/escape-string-regexp, noting medium risk levels.

key_files.name: missions/2026-05-06T06-28-58-917Z_p3_zod/meta.json
key_files.role: Contains metadata for a mission targeting the zod repository.

key_files.name: missions/2026-05-06T06-28-58-917Z_p3_zod/report.json
key_files.role: Provides detailed report on the zod repository structure and potential risks.

key_files.name: demos/full-self-improve-2026-05-04T09-23-04-525Z.transcript.txt
key_files.role: Transcript of a demo demonstrating full self-improvement tasks.

concerns: High risks noted in audits could indicate unstable libraries, especially sindresorhus/dot-prop.
Lack of tests for edge cases in various projects may leave them vulnerable to unhandled scenarios.
README.md in the zod repo is located in a subdirectory, potentially hindering accessibility.
Audit configurations might be outdated, leading to incomplete testing of dependencies.
Demo logs show multiple successful tests but lack context for future verification and reproducibility.
